title: Crude oil gains after EU bans Russian oil imports
section_path: Crude oil gains after EU bans Russian oil imports
section_path_text: Crude oil gains after EU bans Russian oil imports
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Energy markets gained amid concerns of further supply disruptions. That was offset by concerns of inflation-induced slowdown in economic activity, which weighed on sentiment across metals and agriculture sectors. Crude oil prices jumped sharply as the European Union finally managed to agree to a sanction package that includes a ban on Russian oil imports.
